faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Mamaroneck?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Mamaroneck typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the extent of treatment required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants or regular ants?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are larger than most common ants (usually ¼ to ½ inch long) and are typically black or dark brown. You may notice piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or windowsills, hear rustling sounds inside walls, or see large winged ants during spring. Our technicians can quickly identify the species during an inspection.

faqs.question: How long does carpenter ant treatment take in Mamaroneck?
faqs.answer: Initial treatment typically takes 1-2 hours depending on your property size and infestation level. Most infestations require follow-up visits over 2-4 weeks to ensure complete colony elimination. We'll create a customized treatment plan and schedule that works for your Mamaroneck home or business.

faqs.question: Can carpenter ants cause structural damage to my Mamaroneck home?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants excavate wood to build their nests, which can compromise structural integrity over time. This is especially concerning in Mamaroneck's older homes and waterfront properties where moisture attracts these pests. Early detection and professional treatment are essential to prevent extensive and expensive damage.
